heading: Carriage of certain programming
label: 537a Carriage of certain programming
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2018, and not as part of the Communications Act of 1934 which comprises this chapter.

children.text: the term “local commercial television station” has the meaning given the term in ;section 534(h) of this title
the term “multichannel video programming distributor” has the meaning given the term in ;section 522 of this title
the term “qualified noncommercial educational television station” has the meaning given the term in section 535() of this title;l

the term “retransmission consent” means the authority granted to a multichannel video programming distributor under to retransmit the signal of a television broadcast station; andsection 325(b) of this title
the term “television broadcast station” has the meaning given the term in section 76.66(a) of title 47, Code of Federal Regulations.

carry non-incidental video content from a local commercial television station, qualified noncommercial educational television station, or television broadcast station to the extent that such content is owned, controlled, or financed (in whole or in part) by the Government of the Russian Federation; or

lease, or otherwise make available, channel capacity to any person for the provision of video programming that is owned, controlled, or financed (in whole or in part) by the Government of the Russian Federation.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: c Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this section may be construed as applying to the editorial use by a local commercial television station, qualified noncommercial educational television station, or television broadcast station of programming that is owned, controlled, or financed (in whole or in part) by the Government of the Russian Federation.
